response.justification: Strong engineering fundamentals with 20 years of experience and entrepreneurial background, but falls short of the core requirement: demonstrated AI strategy expertise and director-level leadership. Recent exposure to AI infrastructure at re:cinq is promising, yet the resume lacks evidence of building AI products, publishing research, or recognized thought leadership in AI. Currently a Staff Engineer rather than a Principal/Director-level IC with strategic AI focus.
strengths: Exceeds minimum experience (20 years vs. 15 required) across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, multiple open-source projects demonstrating initiative and technical leadership
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq, showing awareness of cutting-edge technologies
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or strategic expertise—the role requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms'
Career trajectory shows strong engineering skills but no evidence of director-level strategic leadership or mentoring at scale
Missing preferred qualification: no Master's or PhD in AI-related field; AI exposure appears recent and operational rather than deep strategic knowledge
